approach_step: 1. Fully Understand the Problem Before You Start Debugging
step_description: A successful debugging session begins with a deep understanding of the issue. Jumping into code changes without clarity often wastes time.
sub_steps: [{'action': 'Reproduce the Issue Consistently', 'details': 'Ensure you can reliably trigger the bug. Use automated tests or simulate conditions to recreate the error.'}, {'action': 'Analyze Error Messages and Logs', 'details': 'Carefully read stack traces and error logs to pinpoint where and why the failure occurs.'}]
